issues.description: Condition missing leader type check. Effect requires 'If your Leader has the {Animal Kingdom Pirates} or {Big Mom Pirates} type' which is not represented. Should include LeaderHasAnyType condition.
Two separate KO actions are listed, but the card text states 'up to 2' Characters—this should be a single action with maxCount:2 to allow choosing 0, 1, or 2 targets, not force exactly 2 KOs.
